npc_seeds.name: Tina 'Redline' Vasquez
npc_seeds.summary: A street-racing Brujah who runs her own crew of neonate anarchs. Acts first, thinks later, but her instinct for injustice is genuine.
npc_seeds.role: Rabble firestarter / Anarch courier / street revolutionary
possible_plots: Redline accidentally stirs up a turf conflict with Gangrel nomads, and the PCs must de-escalate before a riot breaks out.
She discovers Ventrue funding a private security sweep in her territory and asks the PCs for backup to expose it.
A rival Brujah accuses her of sabotaging a rant; violence is brewing, and the PCs are the only neutral parties.

npc_seeds.name: Marcus 'Rust' Halberd
npc_seeds.summary: An ex-metalworker whose frenzy destroyed his mortal life. Now he channels anger into Anarch muscle jobs and rooftop brawls.
npc_seeds.temperament: brooding, volcanic, quick to defend underdogs
possible_plots: Rust begins targeting corrupt mortal cops, threatening the Masquerade unless someone stops him—or helps him do it quietly.
Someone frames Rust for a killing at a rant; he demands the PCs clear his name.
Rust is secretly protecting a mortal activist group whose protests may destabilize Phoenix politics.

npc_seeds.name: Kassandra 'Scorch' Reid
npc_seeds.summary: A pyromaniac Brujah activist who believes fire is the purest symbol of revolution. Dangerous but not malicious—just ideological.
possible_plots: Scorch tags a Camarilla Elysium with flaming Brujah graffiti, provoking a political crackdown.
Her latest ‘symbolic fire’ gets out of hand; she needs rescue or scapegoats.
A Setite manipulator exploits her passion; the PCs must break the influence before she burns down something important.

npc_seeds.name: Dr. Aurelio Montfort
npc_seeds.summary: One of the rare Brujah philosopher-elites. A historian of Carthage who speaks softly but can turn entire rooms with rhetoric.
npc_seeds.role: intellectual revolutionary / Carthage Romantic / Anarch strategist
possible_plots: Aurelio believes Phoenix could become a new Carthage and recruits the PCs to secure political footholds in key clans.
A rival Brujah rabble faction accuses him of elitism and betrayal; the coterie must prevent a clan civil war.
He uncovers evidence that a Camarilla elder played a role in sabotaging the original Carthage. Powerful factions want the truth buried.

npc_seeds.name: Professor Helen Zarovich
npc_seeds.summary: A former ASU political theorist who blends academic radicalism with ancient Brujah ideals. Her lectures are as dangerous as riots.
npc_seeds.role: bridge figure between academia and street activism
possible_plots: Helen’s mortal students start a protest movement influenced by her vampiric ideology—forcing the PCs to contain the fallout.
She’s preparing a manifesto that could unite Anarchs; enemies try to steal or destroy it.
Helen is hunted by a Brujah elder who considers her ideas heretical; the coterie is pulled into the ideological feud.

npc_seeds.name: Jax Calder
npc_seeds.summary: A charismatic ranter who blends brutal street instinct with flashes of startling philosophical insight.
possible_plots: Jax’s rants begin attracting too much attention—Camarilla watchers target him, and he begs the PCs for protection.
He decides to challenge a local Anarch lieutenant, igniting factional chaos.
A Toreador claims Jax is being manipulated by a supernatural muse; investigation reveals something stranger.

npc_seeds.name: Selene Moretti
npc_seeds.summary: A Brujah diplomat who negotiates rebel demands with Camarilla elders. She believes rebellion must be engineered, not improvised.
possible_plots: Selene hires the PCs to ensure a peace negotiation doesn’t collapse into violence.
Tremere attempt to blackmail her using a secret from her mortal past; she turns to the coterie for help.
She is secretly grooming a mortal political candidate whose platform aligns with Brujah ideology—others want to sabotage the project.

npc_seeds.name: Aamon 'The Cainite Punk' Reyes
npc_seeds.summary: A legendary rant performer who blends philosophy with performance art and acts as an underground icon for Brujah youth.
possible_plots: Aamon plans a city-wide rant event that risks drawing too much mortal attention; the PCs must manage or redirect it.
His philosophies start causing schisms in the clan—elders demand he be silenced.
Sabbat infiltrators mimic his rhetoric to recruit neonates; he asks PCs to help expose them.

npc_seeds.name: Karina 'Brickhouse' Bell
npc_seeds.summary: An urban warrior who treats every confrontation as political expression. She provides muscle at rants and enforces Brujah honor code.
possible_plots: Karina challenges a Camarilla Scourge to a duel; the PCs must navigate the fallout.
She believes a Kindred elder insulted Brujah honor and plans retaliation; the coterie must calm or redirect her.
Her mortal family gets caught up in Anarch politics—forcing her into a vulnerable negotiation with PCs.

npc_seeds.name: Ronin Pierce
npc_seeds.summary: A wandering Brujah duelist who participates in rants around the Southwest. Seen as part philosopher, part executioner.
possible_plots: Ronin seeks the PCs to help him track an ancient enemy rumored to be hiding in Phoenix.
He takes an interest in a PC’s ideology, mentoring them—or manipulating them.
Brujah elders want Ronin expelled from the city before he inspires unrest.
